narrative:
60 Ohio House district has 87,614 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -0.1% D−R vs -24.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
